headline: ComEd, Chicago Park District Offer Illinois Residents Opportunity to Switch On Buckingham Fountain for Summer
summary: CHICAGO, April 06, 2026--ComEd and the Chicago Park District invite everyone to welcome in the summer season at the 12th annual Switch on Summer festival on Saturday, May 9 at the site of Chicago’s historic Buckingham Fountain in Grant Park. As part of the event, one lucky Illinois resident will have the chance to switch on the jets that turn on the iconic fountain.
